title: Meeting Notes Pro — Notion Template
description:
Stop losing decisions, action items, and follow-ups in scattered docs and endless email threads. Meeting Notes Pro is a complete Notion workspace that covers the entire meeting lifecycle — from agenda prep to post-meeting accountability.

Built around 5 interconnected databases (Meetings, Action Items, People, Projects & Teams, and Agenda Templates), this template gives you a single source of truth for every meeting your team runs. Automatically calculate meeting duration, track overdue tasks, and roll up open action counts by person or project — all without manual effort.

The dashboard surfaces upcoming meetings, your open action items, and overdue tasks the moment you open Notion. Twelve pre-built database views let you slice your data by status, owner, priority, project, or date. A built-in Analytics page helps you spot bottlenecks and measure team accountability over time.

Perfect for project managers, team leads, executive assistants, product managers, and remote-first teams of 5–25 people. Whether you run daily standups or quarterly planning sessions, this template keeps everyone aligned and nothing falls through the cracks.

Includes a full How-To guide, a 3-step getting-started flow, and reusable agenda templates for 8 common meeting types. One-time purchase, instant download.
features: 5 fully relational databases (Meetings, Action Items, People, Projects & Teams, Agenda Templates) that stay in sync automatically — no duplicate data entry required.
Smart formula columns auto-calculate meeting duration, days until due, and flag overdue action items so you always know what needs attention right now.
A central Dashboard home page surfaces upcoming meetings, your personal open action items, overdue tasks, and quick stats in one glance.
12+ pre-built database views including Board, Calendar, By Owner, By Project, High Priority, and Overdue — giving you instant visibility without building views from scratch.
A reusable Agenda Templates library with pre-built structures for 8 meeting types (Standup, Retrospective, Client Call, and more) so every meeting starts prepared.

faq.q: Do I need to be a Notion expert to use this template?
faq.a: Intermediate Notion experience is helpful — you should be comfortable navigating databases and linked views. That said, the included How-To guide and 3-step getting-started flow walk you through the entire setup process clearly. Most users are up and running within 30 minutes.

faq.q: Can I use this template for a team, or is it just for personal use?
faq.a: It's designed specifically for teams of 5–25 people. The People Directory and relation-based attendee and owner tracking make it easy to manage accountability across your whole group. Simply share the Notion page with your workspace members and assign them in the People database to activate @mention notifications.

faq.q: What happens after I purchase? How do I get the template?
faq.a: After purchase you'll receive a Notion template link instantly. Click the link, hit 'Duplicate' in Notion, and the entire workspace — all 5 databases, all views, the dashboard, and the how-to guide — is copied directly into your Notion account. No installation or third-party tools required.
